title: Easter Rabbits
description: Makes rabbits lay eggs every now and then.
body:
### Functionality
With this mod installed, rabbits will lay eggs in the same frequency as chickens do (every 5-10 minutes). Those eggs are vanilla eggs and will hatch chickens.\
What? You thought there's more to it? Nope, that's all the mod does.

![Short showcase of the mod](https://i.imgur.com/f8rGvSD.gif)

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack.
